item.title: Using a gyroscope to power the earth
item.description: I test to see if gyroscopes can provide free energy by extracting energy from the rotation of the earth.

media:content.media:title: Using a gyroscope to power the earth
media:content.media:description: I test to see if gyroscopes can provide free energy by extracting energy from the rotation of the earth.

item.title: Making fruit sing
item.description: In this video I make a piano out of bananas and make a house plant and some lettuce sing Michael Jackson's "Billie Jean." I use a cool little device called a Makey, Makey to do this. I use the opportunity to talk about how transistors are making it work by showing a simple circuit made from snap circuits. Then I show my skills and play Mary Had a Little Lamb on the bananas.

media:content.media:title: Making fruit sing
media:content.media:description: In this video I make a piano out of bananas and make a house plant and some lettuce sing Michael Jackson's "Billie Jean." I use a cool little device called a Makey, Makey to do this. I use the opportunity to talk about how transistors are making it work by showing a simple circuit made from snap circuits. Then I show my skills and play Mary Had a Little Lamb on the bananas.

item.title: Can a burning bush talk in real life?
item.description: Can a burning bush talk in real life?

media:content.media:title: Can a burning bush talk in real life?
media:content.media:description: Can a burning bush talk in real life?

item.title: Why electrified drops resist splashing
item.description: Electrified drops do not splash upon impacting a surface because the electrostatic charge creates an attraction between the drop and the surface, which suppresses the outward spreading that creates a splash.

media:content.media:title: Why electrified drops resist splashing
media:content.media:description: Electrified drops do not splash upon impacting a surface because the electrostatic charge creates an attraction between the drop and the surface, which suppresses the outward spreading that creates a splash.

item.title: Shining IR light through myself
item.description: Infrared light can penetrate the body two to three times as much as regular light. So, let's see if I can shine it through myself.

media:content.media:title: Shining IR light through myself
media:content.media:description: Infrared light can penetrate the body two to three times as much as regular light. So, let's see if I can shine it through myself.

item.title: Aerogel protects me from lava
item.description: Aerogel, a solid material composed of over 98% air, acts as an incredibly efficient thermal insulator that protects against molten lava

media:content.media:title: Aerogel protects me from lava
media:content.media:description: Aerogel, a solid material composed of over 98% air, acts as an incredibly efficient thermal insulator that protects against molten lava
